category.description: Platform posts use the documented platform categories; tenant categories are free text when site_id is provided.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this item from sidebar/nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_order.description: Sort position within its group (or section if no group). Lower sorts first. Falls back to legacy sort_order, then published_at/created_at, if unset.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label. Falls back to a category→section mapping, then to category itself, if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections. Falls back to a fixed legacy order if unset.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO/browser-tab title override. Falls back to the post title if unset.

site_id.description: Optional site id to create tenant blog posts instead of platform posts.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this item from sidebar/nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_section.description: Top-level sidebar section label. Falls back to a category→section mapping, then to category itself, if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

nav_section_order.description: Sort position of the section itself among all sections. Falls back to a fixed legacy order if unset.

nav_title.description: Sidebar label override. Falls back to the title if unset. Does not affect the public URL.

body.description: Markdown body. To embed a structured visual block inline, add tags like {{component type="faq"}} or {{component type="how_to"}} on their own line where you want the component to render.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

hide_from_nav.description: Excludes this item from sidebar/nav rendering only. Does NOT deindex it or remove it from the sitemap — use robots="noindex,..." for that.

nav_group.description: Optional collapsible subgroup within nav_section (e.g. section "Manage your site" → group "Branding"). Omit for a doc that sits directly under its section with no subgroup. Docs support Section → Group → Page (max 3 levels) — do not attempt deeper nesting via parent_doc_id, which is unused by nav rendering.

nav_group_order.description: Sort position of this subgroup among other groups in the same nav_section. Only meaningful if nav_group is set.

category.description: Platform posts use the documented platform categories; tenant categories are free text when site_id is provided.

expected_updated_at.description: Concurrency token from the post's updated_at (get_platform_blog_post). A stale token is rejected with a conflict so two writers can't silently overwrite each other.

featured_order.description: Sort position in featured/homepage placements, independent of nav ordering.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO/browser-tab title override. Falls back to the post title if unset.

site_id.description: Optional site id to update tenant blog posts instead of platform posts.

slug.description: Manual URL slug override. Published slug changes preserve a permanent redirect by default.

visibility.description: Unlisted posts work by direct URL but are excluded from indexes, search, feeds, and sitemap.
